programmes.show_description: The Judge says anyone foolish enough to co-sign on a lease for a bunch of kids can't get one on their own! S23, Ep61
A well-intended mother tries to crowd too many party items into her garden; when the carnival equipment is moved to the street, alleged damages occur. S23, Ep68
A woman says she was going through a hard time, so she borrowed money from a friend for 'beauty' treatments to cheer her up. S23, Ep69
A woman discovers that her wages are being garnished to satisfy her husband's child support payments to his ex-girlfriend. S23, Ep70
In 2014, 18-year-old UK college student Jamil Palmer was found fatally stabbed in Crane Park, Hounslow. He had suffered three stab wounds, one of which pierced his heart. S1, Ep9
In 1993, Stephen Lawrence was attacked and stabbed twice by a group whilst waiting for a bus with his friend in London, UK, in a racially motivated attack. S1, Ep10
When an unreliable, drugged up prostitute witnesses an attack on a helpless girl, and an unidentified body is found, police wonder if the cases are connected. S5, Ep11
In 1990, three sex workers are murdered. A serial killer was on the loose and detectives had few clues. Over 20 years later there's a break in the case. S16, Ep11
When the wife of a reputable doctor goes missing, investigators discover the doctor house hunting with another woman claiming to be his wife. S5, Ep12
A morning house fire kills the only doctor in a small town. An investigation quickly leads to the arrest of Jason Lively, the son of the doctor's nurse. S16, Ep12
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A woman recognised a detailed drawing of a serial rapist. Police closed in on the suspect and used forensic evidence to bring him down. S7, Ep36
When a family all develop signs of ill-health, the mother happens upon a toxic mould expert who could have the answer to their problems. S7, Ep37
A respected physician is murdered and investigators must use the knowledge of cell phone mapping and wiretapping to catch the killer. S7, Ep38
The family of a dead man claimed he had gone out walking alone and never returned. S7, Ep39
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
When a woman is convicted of killing her own mother, a new theory from an expert witness could prove to be her saving grace. S7, Ep41
Police close in on the kidnapper of teenage girls who tells them where he dumps the bodies. Can they catch him before he strikes again? S7, Ep42
In November of 2016, Dr. Eric Scott Sills called 911 and reported finding his wife and business partner unresponsive at the bottom of the stairs. S36, Ep31
One woman, two husbands dead under strange circumstances - could she be that unlucky? Correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates. S30, Ep2
When Danny Dyke tried playing the hardened drug dealer, he found himself in over his head, but it was his murderers who ended up having sleepless nights. S6, Ep3
When Michael Barber finds his wife Susan in bed with another man, she realises she has to take drastic measures to stop him leaving, but no one could suspect how far she would go. S6, Ep4
In East Sussex, UK, Lewis Ashdown murdered YouTuber Marc Williams after pressuring him to drink excessively. He filmed the entire attack and was and sentenced to life in prison. S1, Ep1
In the US, Lori Isenberg poisoned her husband but told authorities he had drowned, to cover up her fraud. She was eventually caught and pleaded guilty to second degree murder. S1, Ep2
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep101
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep102
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep103

A woman claims the father of her daughter illegally evicted her; he countersues for harassment. S23, Ep76
A young woman sues her ex-business partner for damages resulting from the dissolution of their alleged partnership in a salon. S23, Ep72
A young woman vents to a family friend about her financial troubles after being involved in a hit and run; the friend takes action but expects to be paid back. S23, Ep73
A dog's eye fills with blood after a skirmish with a neighbour's cat; the neighbour denies that her allegedly gentle, loving cat was involved. S23, Ep74
A mechanic makes the mistake of parking a client's car on the street instead of in his shop; he is sued for damages when the vehicle is stolen. S23, Ep75
When a woman sues her ex-friend for excessive mileage on a leased car, the Judge explains why it was a very bad idea. S23, Ep71
As police allegedly escort a son from his father's property, tensions escalate; the ailing father sues for emotional distress. S23, Ep77
When a dog damages doors, carpet and banisters, the pet's owners give him to an animal shelter; their landlord comes after them for repair costs. S23, Ep78
The Judge is baffled by a woman suing her stepfather for damages after she misses months of car payments; he claims she assaulted her mother. S23, Ep79
A woman maces the father of her children because she thinks he is kidnapping the kids; he wipes the pepper spray on her face in retaliation. S23, Ep80
In East Sussex, UK, Lewis Ashdown murdered YouTuber Marc Williams after pressuring him to drink excessively. He filmed the entire attack and was and sentenced to life in prison. S1, Ep1
In the US, Lori Isenberg poisoned her husband but told authorities he had drowned, to cover up her fraud. She was eventually caught and pleaded guilty to second degree murder. S1, Ep2
The latest forensic technology is used to analyse a postcard that could incriminate a religious figure who took part in war crimes. S5, Ep13
When a hearing impaired 77-year-old on a road trip is attacked by a thief and shot to death, investigators are determined to bring the killer to justice. S16, Ep13
Investigators turn to forensic evidence, when CCTV footage of a convenience store murder proves too fuzzy to be of any use. S5, Ep14
A sex offender and murderer attacks in a terrifying rage. This predator evades capture for years, but leaves a critical piece of evidence - his palm print. S16, Ep14
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
We examine the tragic case of Georgia Williams, a 17-year-old from Shropshire, who was murdered by Jamie Reynolds, a disturbed individual who meticulously planned her death. S1, Ep9
We explore the murder of Emma Caldwell, a 27-year-old whose body was found in Limefield Woods in 2005. Iain Packer, a sign installer with a violent past, evaded justice for years. S1, Ep10
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
One woman, two husbands dead under strange circumstances - could she be that unlucky? Correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates. S30, Ep2
Investigators believe a sinister blood trail will lead them to a missing woman, but she's nowhere to be found. Soon fresh evidence crops up. S6, Ep2
A Texas ex-con resolves to live a clean life after his release from prison. When he's arrested for a bloody murder, then convicted, he insists he's innocent. S17, Ep5
A young girl's mutilated corpse is found and her parents are charged with her murder. Five years later, new evidence suggests otherwise. S6, Ep3
A California career woman keeps falling ill and doctors can't determine why. When she dies they still have no explanation, until they find a key figure in her life. S17, Ep6
Sarah Ludemann and Rachel Wade are dating the same boy. Instead of being mad at him, they take out their revenge on each other, leaving Sarah stabbed to death in the street. S1, Ep1
When Jennifer Pan calls police about a home invasion killing her parents, investigators think she's innocent. That is, until her story doesn't add up and proves she is the killer. S1, Ep2
A daughter hears her father's last words - can she help convict his killer? Erin Moriarty investigates. S30, Ep3
When a nurse discovers that she's HIV-positive, science was able to determine not only how she had been infected, but also by whom. The worst part: It wasn't an accident. S8, Ep9
Time of death becomes pivotal after a woman was found murdered in her air-conditioned room. Similarities between her death and a movie give examiners the clues to find the killer. S8, Ep10
An obscure print at a crime scene puzzled Police, where a man was killed and two girls injured. The girls couldn't identify their attacker, but one clue helped track the killer. S8, Ep11
A man is shot in his home, and his ex-wife seems to have a perfect alibi. To determine the time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. S8, Ep12
A woman claims her neighbour brandished a firearm and terrorised her niece; he says he was concerned about a rash of recent burglaries. S23, Ep96
While a man serves time for federal fraud, his wife dates another man accepting jewellery, shoes and a car she refuses to return. S23, Ep97
Questions arise when a gifted youngster allegedly neglects to tell his father that he has been accused of vandalising a neighbour's property. S23, Ep98
A student accuses a former friend of exaggerating his student visa issues and of stealing his property while he was out of the country. S23, Ep99
A fight in Costa Rica leaves a flight attendant with an alleged £20,000 in medical bills; she and her ex dispute custody of 'engagement' jewellery. S23, Ep100
It's the ultimate 'he said, she said' when ex-lovers disagree about everything from living together to how long they dated. S23, Ep101
When a homeowner sees the 'illegal renovations' her rent-to-own tenants have made, she immediately sets in motion a plan to evict them. S23, Ep102
A student sues a security guard for damages to his car while in pursuit of a suspected shoplifter. S10, Ep127
Teen drama escalates when a brick is allegedly thrown through a car window at a party. A man pays for his fiance's engagement ring with her best friend's credit card. S10, Ep128
A teenager claims he received second-degree burns during a free tanning session. S10, Ep129
A man shoots and kills his neighbour's two bull terriers because they were attacking his dog; both pet owners sue for pain and suffering. S10, Ep130
A woman sues her niece for filing false charges claiming she was an alcoholic who neglected her 10-year-old son. A student accuses her ex-boyfriend of attacking her. S10, Ep131
